registry_contract.purpose: One machine-checkable manifest that maps each wave2 capability bead to support-class state, source evidence, proof commands, artifacts, unsupported reasons, fallback behavior, residual risks, and final signoff ownership.

capability_rows.title: Implement full QPACK instruction streams and blocked-stream scheduling
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_h3_qpack cargo test -p asupersync --test http3_qpack_support_matrix_contract --features test-internals,http3 -- --nocapture
e2e_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_h3_qpack_e2e cargo test -p asupersync --test e2e_http3_qpack_instruction_streams --features test-internals,http3 -- --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Full QPACK instruction-stream parity is not advertised until this owner bead lands source and proof.
capability_rows.fallback_target: StaticOnly QPACK policy and existing dynamic field-section context
residual_risks: blocked-stream scheduler semantics remain unpromoted

capability_rows.title: Add production transport-backed RemoteRuntime lifecycle proof
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_remote cargo test -p asupersync --lib remote --features test-internals -- --nocapture
e2e_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_remote_e2e cargo test -p asupersync --test e2e_remote_transport_lifecycle --features test-internals -- --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Production network execution remains adapter responsibility until a transport-backed proof lands.
capability_rows.fallback_target: Injected virtual/lab RemoteRuntime lifecycle proof
residual_risks: real transport EOF/retry/idempotency cleanup still unproven

capability_rows.title: Promote service-worker direct runtime lane
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_wasm_sw cargo test -p asupersync --test wasm_browser_support_boundary_contract --features test-internals,wasm-browser-dev -- --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Service-worker direct runtime remains fail-closed unless the browser host contract proves install/activate/fetch/message lifecycle support.
capability_rows.fallback_target: bounded broker/handoff path
residual_risks: browser lifecycle event constraints may force permanent broker-only support

capability_rows.title: Promote shared-worker direct runtime lane
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_wasm_shared cargo test -p asupersync --test wasm_shared_worker_tenancy_lifecycle_contract --features test-internals,wasm-browser-dev -- --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Shared-worker direct runtime remains fail-closed until multi-client tenancy and shutdown semantics are proven.
capability_rows.fallback_target: shared-worker coordinator and explicit client attach/detach messaging
residual_risks: multi-client region ownership and cancellation fanout remain unproven

capability_rows.title: Promote browser-native messaging and WHATWG stream APIs
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_browser_io cargo test -p asupersync --lib browser_stream --features test-internals,browser-io -- --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Public SDK contract is not promoted until capability checks, close semantics, and browser fixture proof land.
capability_rows.fallback_target: internal browser stream/message substrate
residual_risks: public API export and JS/TS type contract remain incomplete

capability_rows.title: Stabilize external Rust Browser Edition runtime API
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_browser_rust cargo test -p asupersync --test wasm_rust_browser_example_contract --features test-internals,wasm-browser-dev -- --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: External Rust browser API is preview until ABI/version compatibility and fixture proof are promoted.
capability_rows.fallback_target: asupersync-browser-core and maintained fixture workflow
residual_risks: ABI version downgrade diagnostics need final contract proof

capability_rows.title: Repair gRPC deadline and health dormant suites
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_grpc_conformance cargo test -p asupersync --test conformance_registry_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
e2e_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_grpc_conformance_e2e cargo test -p asupersync --test conformance --features test-internals -- grpc --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Dormant suites remain intentionally deferred until registry wiring and source repairs land.
capability_rows.fallback_target: active gRPC conformance lanes already wired in tests/conformance/mod.rs
residual_risks: deadline and health behavior may require source repairs before registry activation

capability_rows.title: Repair HTTP/1 and web session dormant suites
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_h1_web_conformance cargo test -p asupersync --test conformance_registry_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
e2e_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_h1_web_conformance_e2e cargo test -p asupersync --test conformance --features test-internals -- h1 web_session --nocapture

capability_rows.fallback_target: current active HTTP/1/web E2E lanes
residual_risks: cookie/session semantics can drift from active registry if not rewired

capability_rows.title: Repair DNS/UDP/Unix/SQLite dormant suites
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_dns_udp_sqlite cargo test -p asupersync --test conformance_registry_contract --features test-internals,sqlite -- --nocapture
e2e_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_dns_udp_sqlite_e2e cargo test -p asupersync --test conformance --features test-internals,sqlite -- dns udp unix sqlite --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Dormant suites must be repaired and platform-gated before support-class promotion.
capability_rows.fallback_target: active DNS/UDP/SQLite unit and integration tests
residual_risks: Unix socket and filesystem fixture cleanup are platform-scoped

capability_rows.title: Repair actor mailbox and trace event dormant suites

e2e_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_actor_trace_e2e cargo test -p asupersync --test conformance --features test-internals -- actor trace --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Dormant actor/trace suites must be repaired before registry support expands.
capability_rows.fallback_target: existing actor and trace unit/metamorphic coverage
residual_risks: trace schema drift can hide dormant-suite failures

capability_rows.title: Close web framework middleware and streaming support gap
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_web cargo test -p asupersync --lib web --features test-internals -- --nocapture
e2e_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_web_e2e cargo test -p asupersync --test e2e_web --features test-internals -- --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Middleware and streaming are not promoted until extractor, response, SSE, backpressure, and disconnect proof land.
capability_rows.fallback_target: current service/web substrate and active E2E coverage
residual_risks: client disconnect and streaming resource cleanup remain under-proven

capability_rows.title: Complete filesystem API parity and cancellation semantics
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_fs cargo test -p asupersync --lib fs --features test-internals -- --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Filesystem parity remains early/mixed until platform, cancellation, cleanup, and virtualized proof are complete.
capability_rows.fallback_target: current spawn_blocking_io and Vfs-backed APIs
residual_risks: platform-specific permission and symlink semantics need explicit gating

capability_rows.title: Close Redis/NATS/Kafka real-broker E2E parity
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_messaging cargo test -p asupersync --lib messaging --features test-internals,kafka -- --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Stub-only proof cannot promote production broker claims.
capability_rows.fallback_target: parser/local-stub fixtures and feature-gated broker skips
residual_risks: real broker availability and redacted credentials must be handled deterministically

capability_rows.title: Prove 64-core/256GiB massive-swarm capacity envelope
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_scale cargo test -p asupersync --test capacity_envelope_planner_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Large-host proof must explicitly skip on workers without 64 CPU / 256GiB host shape.
capability_rows.fallback_target: fast and standard profiles with unsupported_reason for large-host proof
residual_risks: small workers cannot fabricate large-host p999 evidence

capability_rows.title: Add swarm profile recommendations and no-win diagnostics
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_operator cargo test -p asupersync --test host_profile_planner_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: User-facing recommendations require capacity-envelope artifacts before safe promotion.
capability_rows.fallback_target: conservative profile and explicit no-win/no-evidence diagnostics
residual_risks: aggressive profile recommendation can harm users without rollback evidence

capability_rows.title: Expand refinement proof coverage into adapter/protocol lanes
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_formal cargo test -p asupersync --test formal_proof_posture_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
e2e_proof_commands: rch exec -- bash -lc 'cd formal/lean && lake build'
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Adapter/protocol refinement remains tiered until theorem/model/runtime links are added.
capability_rows.fallback_target: Lean-checked six core invariants plus lane-specific proof tiers
residual_risks: assumptions may remain unlinked without proof-tier inventory

capability_rows.title: Reconcile docs and support matrices after capability promotions
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_docs cargo test -p asupersync --test reality_check_docs_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Docs must stay downstream until source proof and capability evidence registry rows are final.
capability_rows.fallback_target: truthful first-wave boundary language
residual_risks: public docs can overclaim if closed tracker status is treated as proof

capability_rows.title: Publish capability-completion proof pack
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_signoff cargo test -p asupersync --test reality_check_gap_closure_signoff --features test-internals -- --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Final signoff cannot pass while any child capability row is open or missing proof.
capability_rows.fallback_target: live residual-risk owner beads
residual_risks: signoff artifact can become stale if it trusts tracker status alone

capability_rows.title: Publish capability-first user examples and smoke recipes
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_examples cargo test -p asupersync --test wave2_capability_examples_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: Promoted capabilities still need public examples or stable unsupported reasons.
capability_rows.fallback_target: test fixtures and support matrices
residual_risks: users may be unable to adopt capabilities that are proven only internally

capability_rows.title: Fix default storm-monitor alignment regression
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_supervision_lib cargo test -p asupersync --lib restart_tracker_ -- --nocapture
e2e_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_supervision_metamorphic cargo test -p asupersync --test metamorphic_supervision_strategies -- --nocapture
capability_rows.unsupported_reason: A live source-unit regression remains until the storm monitor and restart-budget oracle are reconciled.
capability_rows.fallback_target: existing supervision policies with known failing source filter
residual_risks: weakening storm detection would preserve tests while harming users

capability_rows.title: Build unified capability evidence registry and proof manifest
unit_proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wave2_registry cargo test -p asupersync --test wave2_capability_evidence_registry_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
capability_rows.fallback_target: fail closed on missing field or stale evidence
residual_risks: future wave2 beads must be added to required_wave2_child_beads when created
